failure_movement.justification: Prediction said unknown shrinks 2-4 (actual: grew +4, opposite direction) and wrong stays stable (actual: shrank -4). Empty correctly predicted stable at 4. Two of three clusters got wrong direction; only empty was correct.

trace_movement.justification: Vocab-mismatch retrieval improvement confirmed for 10d9b85a (tongue-twister docs replaced by relevant content, task flipped to pass). 3249768e and 8aef76bc predicted to flip but stayed failing with unchanged top-retrieved docs. Prompt-token flat claim confirmed (-0.11%). Partial credit.

side_effects.justification: Prediction correctly flagged regression risk from removing answer-boosting, but underestimated magnitude (predicted 1-2, actual 4 regressions: c4ea545c, gpt4_213fd887, c9f37c46, b86304ba all moved correct->unknown). Direction correct, magnitude significantly off.
